/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=x86-64-v2 -mtune=generic -flto -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/parser/html_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/parser/css_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/parser/js_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/parser/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/ir/unified_doc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/ir/dom_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/ir/css_rule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/ir/js_scope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/ir/identifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/css_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/html_minifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/css_minifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/js_minifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/cross_identifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/dead_css.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/dead_js.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/css_shorthand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/js_constant_fold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/brotli_reorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/transform/obfuscator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/util/string_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tinyizer.dir/src/util/frequency_map.cpp.o -o tinyizer
